message: 🌱 Add strimzi: Add ability in KafkaConnect to use secrets provided by mission (#633)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "strimzi-5277-add-ability-in-kafkaconnect-to-use-secrets-provided-by-secrets-stor",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "strimzi: Add ability in KafkaConnect to use secrets provided by Secrets Store CSI Driver",
+    "description": "Add ability in KafkaConnect to use secrets provided by Secrets Store CSI Driver. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current strimzi deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your strimzi version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
helm list -n strimzi 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working strimzi installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review strimzi configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant strimzi configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl get configmap -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=strimzi
```
At the moment there is no nice way to use secrets for Kafka Connect, which are fetched from cloud key vaults (in our case it is Azure) using [Secrets Store CSI Driver](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/secrets-store-csi-driver) project."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add ability in KafkaConnect to use secrets provided by",
+        "description": "This feature request is still valid.

For someone who is looking for a solution to this, existing functionality, at version 0.43.0, does not solve the problem of having **ephemeral** volumes required by the [Secrets Store CSI
```yaml
spec:
  template:
    pod:
      volumes:
        - name: creds-volume
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            # PersistentVolumeClaimVolumeSource v1 core: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.23/#persistentvolumeclaimvolumesource-v1-core
            claimName: creds
            readOnly: true
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade strimzi to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade strimzi:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade strimzi strimzi/strimzi --namespace strimzi
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi
helm list -n strimzi
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl get events -n strimzi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add ability in KafkaConnect to use secrets provided by" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This feature request is still valid.

For someone who is looking for a solution to this, existing functionality, at version 0.43.0, does not solve the problem of having **ephemeral** volumes required by the [Secrets Store CSI Driver](https://secrets-store-csi-driver.sigs.k8s.io/topics/sync-as-kubernetes-secret).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "spec:
  template:
    pod:
      volumes:
        - name: creds-volume
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            # PersistentVolumeClaimVolumeSource v1 core: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.23/#persistentvolumeclaimvolumesource-v1-core
            claimName: creds
            readOnly: true",
+        "kind: Pod
apiVersion: v1
metadata:
  name: secrets-store-inline
spec:
  containers:
    - name: busybox
      image: registry.k8s.io/e2e-test-images/busybox:1.29
      command:
      - "/bin/sleep"
      - "10000"
      volumeMounts:
      - name: creds-inline
        mountPath: "/mnt/secrets-store"
        readOnly: true
  volumes:
    - name: creds-inline
      csi:
        driver: secrets-store.csi.k8s.io
        readOnly: true
        volumeAttributes:
          secretProviderClass: "secrets-sync"",
+        "apiVersion: secrets-store.csi.x-k8s.io/v1
kind: SecretProviderClass
metadata:
  name: secrets-sync
spec:
  provider: aws
  parameters:
    objects: |
        - objectName: "arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-east-1:123456789012:secret:my-service/database_username"
          objectAlias: "my-service-db-username"
        - objectName: "arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-east-1:123456789012:secret:my-service/database_password"
          objectAlias: "my-service-db-password"
  secretObjects:
    - secretName: my-service-creds
      type: Opaque
      data: 
      - objectName: "my-service-db-username"
        key: username
      - objectName: "my-service-db-password"
        key: password"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "strimzi",
+      "incubating",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "strimzi"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Persistentvolumeclaim"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator/issues/5277",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator"
+    },
+    "reactions": 19,
+    "comments": 6,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with strimzi installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:25:00.339Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
